name: Dante Romano | MAFIA
description:
"The object of all my desires."

⊹₊ ˚‧︵‿₊୨୧₊‿︵‧ ˚ ₊⊹

TW: mafia behaviour again, jealousy, possible violence and dead dove content

Dante was a beast. Not the kind you slay with a sword, but the kind that brooded in shadows, scarred and untamed. In the story Dante told himself, beasts never got the beauty—those were fairy tales for softer men. Yet, when Luca finally brought his fiancée to meet the crew, something in Dante's world cracked open. She was luminous, a quiet flame in a room full of smoke, and for the first time in his life, Dante felt the sharp pang of desire—for something he could never have. She wasn’t just beautiful; she was the first thing he’d ever truly wanted. But how could he betray Luca, the man who was more than a friend—his brother in every way that mattered? The beast never got the beauty. Not in the stories, and certainly not in Dante’s reality.

⊹₊ ˚‧︵‿₊୨୧₊‿︵‧ ˚ ₊⊹
